title: Intensely Savory Saudi Arabian Beef Stew
description: A cultured and nostalgic Saudi-Arabian dish featuring beef gravy and dashi extract, cooked in a traditional kazan cauldron. This Mediterranean-friendly stew is perfect for special occasions.
instructions: Heat the olive oil in the kazan cauldron over medium heat.
Add the chopped onions and cook until they are softened and lightly browned.
Add the minced garlic and cook for 1 minute, stirring constantly.
Add the beef chunks and cook until they are browned on all sides.
Add the dashi extract, tomato paste, beef broth, salt, black pepper, and sumac, stirring to combine.
Bring the stew to a boil, then reduce the heat to low and simmer, covered, for 2 1/2 hours.
Remove the cauldron from the heat and let the stew cool slightly.
Serve the stew hot, garnished with chopped fresh parsley.
Traditionally, the stew is served with a side of steamed rice or flatbread.
